title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates how to run Claude Code, an agentic coding tool by Anthropic, on Amazon Bedrock to keep data within AWS infrastructure for compliance and billing reasons. The walkthrough covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and content governance via Bedrock Guardrails.
writeup: This AWS Developers walkthrough demonstrates running Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool, against Amazon Bedrock rather than Anthropic's direct API. It covers environment setup, cross-region inference, and prompt caching, along with per-team cost tracking and content governance through Bedrock Guardrails. The throughline is keeping data within AWS infrastructure while using Claude Code for agentic coding workflows.
